hero.headline: I build digital products.
hero.subheadline: Faster than an agency. Sharper than a freelancer.

items.title: Strategy
items.desc: Thesis, positioning and business model. I define the direction before writing a line of code.

items.title: Architecture
items.desc: Identity, visual system and full brand. Design as a competitive advantage.

items.title: Product
items.desc: Web, e-commerce, platform or app. I build what your business needs.

items.title: Growth
items.desc: AI-powered content, ads, and automations. I make the product work for you.

zolfo-medicina-estetica.tagline: Premium medical portal with admin panel and individual SEO per treatment.
zolfo-medicina-estetica.description: Complete portal for Zolfo Medicina Estética. 21 treatment pages with individual SEO, content management admin panel, and WhatsApp-integrated contact system.

metrics.title: Metrics & Outcomes
metrics.treatments_desc: Views distribution per treatment (GA Page Views)

nurestetica.tagline: Modern institutional website with extreme performance and flawless UX.
nurestetica.description: Institutional website for NurEstética. Clean professional design focused on conversion. Optimized for maximum performance with perfect user experience metrics.

authmotion.tagline: Enterprise IAM system with JWT, OAuth 2.0, 2FA and RBAC.
authmotion.description: Complete authentication and authorization system built with .NET 10 and Clean Architecture. Includes JWT HttpOnly, OAuth 2.0, two-factor authentication (2FA), and role-based access control (RBAC). Open source and production-ready.

smartwallet.tagline: Financial engine with double-entry bookkeeping and Azure Key Vault.
smartwallet.description: Robust financial system with Double-Entry Bookkeeping architecture. Built with .NET 8, SQL Server, and Azure. Includes Azure Key Vault for secure secret management and encryption keys.

cards.label: Data Security
cards.desc: Credentials isolated inside Azure Key Vault

malcombuilder.tagline: Studio website — AI-native, multilingual, built with Next.js 15 and Tailwind v4.
malcombuilder.description: Portfolio and storefront for malcom.builder. Built with the modern stack: Next.js 15 App Router, React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, Framer Motion 11. Multilingual ES/EN with next-intl, dark/light mode with next-themes. Designed to convert visits into clients.

cards.label: Localization
cards.desc: next-intl localized directly at edge router speed

cards.label: Lighthouse Performance
cards.desc: Perfect optimization and SEO audit results

pulse.tagline: 24/7 web monitoring with Telegram alerts, monthly reports and real-time dashboard.
pulse.description: Website monitoring system with 5-minute check intervals. Instant Telegram alerts when a site goes down. Monthly PDF reports with uptime, response time, and SSL statistics. Interactive real-time dashboard with live charts.

cards.label: Monitor Rate
cards.desc: Constant site ping and check rate
